nasb.text: Now it came about after this that Absalom provided for himself a chariot and horses and fifty men as runners before him.

esv.text: After this Absalom got himself a chariot and horses, and fifty men to run before him.

cnv.text: 這事以後，押沙龍為自己預備了一輛戰車和一些馬匹，又預備了五十人在他前面奔走開路。

ccb.text: 后来，押沙龙为自己备了车马，又派五十个人在他前面开道。
